title: The American Story: Handbook
title-note: accompanying the NBC University of the Air series
additional-note: The renewal for the supplement volume noted here was filed under Books. We have not determined the copyright status of the 'American Story' radio programs which the Handbook accompanied, and which first aired in 1944 and 1945.  Copyright persists in at least some of the scripts, 10 of which were published in a copyright-renewed book published in 1944; other scripts may have been registered under Drama, and we have not checked Drama renewals. Copyright likely also persists in the sound recordings of the episodes.
